ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "limit_bal" INTEGER /* Credit limit assigned to the customer */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Gender of the customer (1: Male, 2: Female) */,
  "education" INTEGER /* Education level of the customer (1: Graduate school, 2: University, 3: High school, 4: Others) */,
  "marriage" INTEGER /* Marital status of the customer (1: Married, 2: Single, 3: Others) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the customer (e.g., Employed, Self-employed) */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents the customer has */,
  "credit_history" TEXT /* Summary of the customer's credit history */,
  "risk_profile" TEXT /* Overall risk profile of the customer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the customer's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., Purchase, Payment, Withdrawal) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., Completed, Pending, Rejected) */,
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the merchant involved in the transaction */,
  "merchant_name" TEXT /* Name of the merchant */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the transaction took place */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "is_fraudulent" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the transaction is fraudulent */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the transaction record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit score entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date the credit score was calculated */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the credit scoring model used */,
  "score_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the credit score */,
  "score_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the credit score will expire */,
  "recommended_action" TEXT /* Recommended action based on the credit score */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the credit score record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_scores_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_scores_model_version FOREIGN KEY ("model_version") REFERENCES models ("version")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer applying for the loan */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the loan application was submitted */,
  "loan_amount" INTEGER /* Requested loan amount */,
  "loan_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan (e.g., Home purchase, Personal, Business) */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the loan application (e.g., Approved, Rejected, Pending) */,
  "co_applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the co-applicant (if any) */,
  "co_applicant_name" TEXT /* Name of the co-applicant */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan in months */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate on the loan */,
  "collateral" TEXT /* Description of any collateral provided */,
  "income_sources" TEXT /* Additional income sources of the customer */,
  "employment_history" TEXT /* Employment history of the customer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the loan application record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_disbursements" (
  "disbursement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan disbursement */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application */,
  "disbursement_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was disbursed */,
  "disbursed_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the loan disbursed */,
  "disbursement_method" TEXT /* Method of disbursement (e.g., Bank transfer, Check) */,
  "disbursement_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the disbursement */,
  "disbursement_channel" TEXT /* Channel used for disbursement */,
  "disbursement_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the disbursement */,
  "disbursement_fee" REAL /* Fee charged for the disbursement */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the disbursement record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disbursement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_disbursements_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_repayments" (
  "repayment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan repayment */,
  "disbursement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan disbursement */,
  "repayment_date" TEXT /* Date the repayment was made */,
  "repayment_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the repayment */,
  "repayment_method" TEXT /* Method of repayment (e.g., Bank transfer, Check) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the repayment (e.g., Completed, Partial, Missed) */,
  "repayment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the repayment */,
  "repayment_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the repayment */,
  "repayment_channel" TEXT /* Channel used for repayment */,
  "repayment_fee" REAL /* Fee charged for the repayment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the repayment record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repayment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_repayments_disbursement_id FOREIGN KEY ("disbursement_id") REFERENCES loan_disbursements ("disbursement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan status entry */,
  "disbursement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan disbursement */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was recorded */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan (e.g., Active, Paid off, Defaulted) */,
  "next_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the next payment */,
  "outstanding_balance" INTEGER /* Outstanding balance of the loan */,
  "last_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last payment */,
  "late_payment_count" INTEGER /* Number of late payments */,
  "next_payment_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the next payment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the loan status record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_status_disbursement_id FOREIGN KEY ("disbursement_id") REFERENCES loan_disbursements ("disbursement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Risk Analyst, Credit Officer, Compliance Officer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions associated with the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the role record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the user was hired */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., View, Edit, Delete) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the access log record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action occurred */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., Create, Update, Delete) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource affected */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the audit trail record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., Active, Inactive, Testing) */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the model record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
